children.label: I
children.text: committed to the verifiable suspension of North Korea’s proliferation and testing of weapons of mass destruction, including systems designed in whole or in part for the delivery of such weapons; and

children.label: II
children.text: has agreed to multilateral talks including the Government of the United States, with the goal of permanently and verifiably limiting North Korea’s weapons of mass destruction and ballistic missile programs; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the suspension is vital to the national security interests of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: if the President submits a certification under subparagraph (A)(ii), an explanation of the reasons the suspension is vital to the national security interests of the United States.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: c Termination
children.text: Subject to , any requirement to impose sanctions under this subtitle or the amendments made by this subtitle, and any sanctions imposed pursuant to this subtitle or any such amendment, shall terminate on the date on which the President makes the certification described in .section 9265 of this titlesection 9252 of this title11
